NCH_BENE_PTA_COINSRNC_LBLTY_AM) for all acute inpatient claims 
where the CLM_PMT_AMT >= 0. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ACUTE_BENE_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Acute inpatient claims are a subset of the claims in the IP data file consisting of data from both acute 
hospitals and critical access hospitals (CAH). These facilities are those where either the 3rd digit of the 
provider number (SAS variable PRVDR_NUM) = 0 or the 3rd and 4th digits of
